01_initial_request.target_name: PrP-amyloid seeding activity, tau, and neurofilament-light (NfL)
01_initial_request.input_data: Longitudinal blood and CSF biofluid samples from at-risk individuals in the National Prion Monitoring Cohort
01_initial_request.user_intent: Characterize the evolution of fluid biomarkers during the presymptomatic phase to predict proximity to prion disease onset
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: Rates of change in biomarker levels serving as sensitive predictors of disease onset

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Longitudinal biofluid samples needed from at-risk individuals to characterize biomarker evolution. [Gap] No established resource for repeated biomarker examination in prion disease at-risk populations. [Decision] To achieve biomarker discovery, chose to use NPMC cohort sampling to perform longitudinal biofluid collection on at-risk individuals, expecting to obtain 648 CSF and plasma samples.

parameters.converter_count: 16 people who had samples taken when healthy but later developed IPD
parameters.follow_up_range: 9.9 years prior to and 7.4 years after onset

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Biofluid archive established with longitudinal samples from IPD-AR, iCJD-AR, symptomatic IPD, CJD, and healthy control cohorts

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] RT-QuIC assays needed to detect PrP-amyloid seeding activity in CSF. [Gap] Optimal conditions vary by PRNP mutation type. [Decision] To achieve sensitive detection, chose to use IQ-CSF RT-QuIC to perform assay optimization on CJD and E200K symptomatic samples, expecting to obtain 100% sensitivity and specificity.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: 100% sensitivity and specificity for sporadic CJD, iatrogenic and familial CJD phenotypes; 15 positive and 2 equivocal results from CJD sample set

references.citation: Orru CD, Groveman BR, Foutz A, et al. Ring trial of 2nd generation RT-QuIC diagnostic tests for sporadic CJD. Ann Clin Transl Neurol. 2020
references.relevance: Reference for IQ-CSF RT-QuIC assay methodology

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] P102L mutation requires different RT-QuIC conditions than E200K/CJD. [Gap] Standard IQ-CSF RT-QuIC negative for symptomatic P102L samples. [Decision] To achieve P102L detection, chose to use HuPrP P102L RT-QuIC to perform bespoke assay optimization on P102L symptomatic samples, expecting to obtain partial sensitivity.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Positive in 4 of 9 symptomatic P102L carriers; all 4 positive samples from classical GSS phenotype at onset

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Other IPD mutations (6-OPRI, A117V, D178N) need RT-QuIC screening. [Gap] No compatible RT-QuIC assay discovered for these mutations. [Decision] To achieve broad mutation coverage, chose to use BV RT-QuIC to perform testing on other IPD mutation samples, expecting to obtain universal detection.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: No compatible RT-QuIC assay discovered for classical 6-OPRI, A117V and D178N; all at-risk samples tested negative

references.citation: Orrú CD, Groveman BR, Raymond LD, et al. Bank vole prion protein as an apparently universal substrate for RT-QuIC-based detection and discrimination of prion strains. PLoS Pathog. 2015
references.relevance: Reference for BV rPrP as potential universal acceptor

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] At-risk individuals need RT-QuIC screening to detect presymptomatic seeding activity. [Gap] Unknown if presymptomatic seeding can be detected years before onset. [Decision] To achieve presymptomatic detection, chose to use RT-QuIC assays to perform testing on IPD-AR and iCJD-AR CSF cohorts, expecting to obtain seeding positivity rates.

parameters.P102L-AR_samples: 22 samples tested with HuPrP P102L, 27 with BV RT-QuIC

02_agent_trajectory.observation: 4 positive E200K-AR samples detected; 1 P102L-AR sample positive; seeding activity detected several years before clinical onset in E200K

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Neurodegeneration biomarkers need ultrasensitive measurement. [Gap] Traditional immunoassays lack sensitivity for early changes. [Decision] To achieve single-molecule resolution, chose to use Simoa HD-X Analyser with N4PB kit to perform biomarker measurement on plasma and CSF samples, expecting to obtain GFAP, NfL, tau and UCH-L1 concentrations.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: 416 plasma and 135 CSF samples measured; biomarker concentrations extrapolated from standard curve fitted to four-parameter logistic algorithm

references.citation: Rissin DM, Kan CW, Campbell TG, et al. Single-molecule enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay detects serum proteins at subfemtomolar concentrations. Nat Biotechnol. 2010
references.relevance: Reference for Simoa digital immunoassay platform

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Biomarker values are positively skewed and affected by normal ageing. [Gap] Need to normalize for age effects and enable group-wise comparison. [Decision] To achieve valid statistical comparison, chose to use Log10 transformation and age-normalization to perform data preprocessing on GFAP, NfL, tau and UCH-L1 values, expecting to obtain approximately normally distributed data.

parameters.comparison_groups: healthy controls, IPD-AR >2 years, IPD-AR <2 years, symptomatic IPD, CJD, iCJD-AR

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Log10 transformation reduced skewness across sample cohorts, rendering them approximately normally distributed

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Group differences in biomarker levels need statistical testing. [Gap] Unknown which biomarkers segregate at-risk from symptomatic cohorts. [Decision] To achieve group comparison, chose to use single factor ANOVA with pairwise t-tests to perform statistical analysis on age-normalized biomarker values, expecting to obtain P-values for cohort differences.

parameters.software: GraphPad Prism version 9.2.0 and STATA v15.1

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Plasma GFAP and NfL showed statistically significant mean values between IPD-AR >2 years and IPD-AR <2 years (P=0.0006 for GFAP, P=0.002 for NfL); CSF NfL also significant (P=0.03)

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Rates of change in biomarkers may be more sensitive predictors than cross-sectional values. [Gap] Need to model individual biomarker trajectories over time. [Decision] To achieve rate estimation, chose to use mixed effects regression models to perform trajectory modeling on presymptomatic NfL and GFAP values, expecting to obtain slope estimates for fast and slow IPD.

parameters.data_window: up to 4 years prior to conversion for slow IPD; 6 months for fast IPD
parameters.post_conversion: one time point up to 6 months after conversion

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Estimated slope for plasma log(NfL) of 0.108 pg/ml/year in slow IPD (95% CI 0.0662, 0.149) and 1.279 pg/ml/year in fast IPD; plasma log(GFAP) 0.090 pg/ml/year in slow IPD with x-intercept of 4.009 years

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Longitudinal biomarker trajectory analysis with RT-QuIC seeding assays and Simoa digital immunoassays

RT-QuIC_sensitivity_E200K.interpretation: IQ-CSF RT-QuIC proved 100% sensitive for E200K and CJD phenotypes

RT-QuIC_specificity.interpretation: All control CSF samples (n=59) tested negative

plasma_GFAP_P_value.interpretation: Significant difference between IPD-AR >2 years versus IPD-AR <2 years

plasma_NfL_slope_slow_IPD.interpretation: Rate of change in slow IPD with 95% CI 0.0662, 0.149

plasma_GFAP_slope_slow_IPD.interpretation: Rate of change in slow IPD with x-intercept of 4.009 years pre-conversion

presymptomatic_seeding_detection.interpretation: E200K presymptomatic seeding period detected up to 3.75 years before onset

03_success_verification.final_verdict: Research objective achieved: Distinct biomarker trajectories identified for fast and slow IPDs. Plasma GFAP emerged as a novel proximity marker changing before NfL and before clinical conversion. RT-QuIC detected presymptomatic seeding activity several years before onset in E200K. Rates of change in plasma GFAP and NfL serve as sensitive predictors of disease onset, with slow IPDs showing gradual increases up to 4 years pre-conversion and fast IPDs showing explosive changes near onset.
